title: Sreymom Yen (the Borg Queen)
summary: Co-leader of the community, addressed in the sessions as the Borg Queen alongside Kosol's Borg King.
markdown:
**Sreymom Yen** is a co-leader of the community and a recurring presence in the archive.
Within the sessions' imagery she is identified as the **Borg Queen** — the counterpart to
the **Borg King** — a framing drawn from the collective, hive-mind language Unimetrix 1 uses
for its own nature.

She appears in the transcripts among the group of close participants and family named at the
start of sessions, and the community's own materials describe her as a co-leader of its
worldwide work in spiritual and consciousness development.

The "Borg" motif runs throughout the archive — Unimetrix 1 describes itself in terms of a
collective intelligence, and the community adopts that language for its own roles. Sreymom
Yen stands at the center of it, alongside [Dr. Kosol Ouch](/lore/kosol-ouch/).
